headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: NBC News is looking to speak with patients, medical providers and healthcare advocates about the changes they are experiencing due to a new Medicaid work mandate.

headlines.title: Cyclospora parasite not found in any Taylor Farm lettuce samples after product recall, FDA says
headlines.description: A Food and Drug Administration test on a sample of lettuce from a supplier that has recalled products because of a multistate cyclosporiasis outbreak produced a false positive for the parasite, the agency said Sunday.

headlines.title: Summer Health Facts vs. Myths: Swimmer’s Ear, Ticks, More
headlines.description: Dr. Jen Caudle, family physician and associate professor at Rowan University, joins TODAY to separate fact from fiction on common summer health myths like Seasonal Affective Disorder, swimmer’s ear, mosquito bites and more.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce Test for Cyclospora Was False Positive: FDA
headlines.description: There is new confusion on the cyclospora outbreak sickening thousands of people across the country after the FDA says that a test sample of Taylor Farms lettuce produced a false positive for the disease. The agency says no products have tested positive for the disease yet and that it's continuing to investigate the outbreak. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms and Taco Bell removes iceberg lettuce amid parasite outbreak
headlines.description: In a new statement, Taylor Farms says they are voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce from the U.S. market sourced from one Mexican farm. Taco Bell says they have removed all Taylor Farms lettuce from their restaurants and supply chain nationwide. NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: New FDA-Approved Pill Drastically Lowers Bad Cholesterol
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Thursday approved a new cholesterol pill from Merck called Lipfendra, that is said to drastically reduce LDL cholesterol. It was previously only available through injections.

headlines.title: Fleas are every pet parent’s worst nightmare – here’s how to get rid of them
headlines.description: Vets say getting rid of fleas involves three steps: diagnosis, treatment and prevention, and cleaning. Here’s how to complete each one and products to use.

headlines.title: Is the Oura Ring 5 worth it?
headlines.description: The Oura Ring 5 is significantly smaller and slimmer than previous versions. But is it worth the upgrade? I tested it for over a month to find out.

headlines.title: Save 40% off on this go-everywhere tote from Lands End
headlines.description: The popular Lands’ End Medium 5-Pocket Canvas Tote is durable and perfect for everyday errands and right now you can get it for 40 percent off.

headlines.title: Save up to 76% off during Target’s early back-to-school sale
headlines.description: Target’s early back-to-school sale has up to 76 percent off backpacks, school supplies, lunch gear and more. Shop the best deals before they’re gone.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms recalls iceberg lettuce amid cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: Federal health officials have told people to avoid lettuce from Taco Bell restaurants in five states: Kentucky, Indiana, Michigan, Ohio and West Virginia.

headlines.title: Map: Track the spread of measles in the U.S.
headlines.description: NBC News is tracking confirmed measles case counts and state infection tallies. This data will be updated regularly.
